name: Biomonitor
descriptionData: Subdermal implant which generates a readout of vitals. Can link to Agent.

name: Chemskin
descriptionData: Dyes and pigments infused into the skin to permanently change its hue. +2 to Personal Grooming if user also has Techhair.

name: EMP Threading
descriptionData: Thin silver lines that run in circuit-like patterns across the body.

name: Light Tattoo
descriptionData: Subdermal patches store light and project colored tattoos under the skin. +2 to Wardrobe and Style if user has three or more tattoos.

name: Shift Tacts
descriptionData: Color-changing lenses implanted into the eye.

name: Skinwatch
descriptionData: Subdermally implanted LED watch.

name: Techhair
descriptionData: Color-light-emitting artificial hair. +2 to Personal Grooming if user also has Chemskin.

name: Neural Link
descriptionData: Wired artificial nervous system. Required to use Neuralware and Subdermal Grip. Has 5 Option Slots.

name: Braindance Recorder
descriptionData: Records user's experiences to memory chip or external device. Requires Neural Link.

name: Chipware Socket
descriptionData: A single socket installed in back of the neck. Required to use Chipware. Requires Neural Link.

name: Interface Plugs
descriptionData: Plugs in wrist or head that allow connection to machines. Requires Neural Link.

name: Kerenzikov
descriptionData: Speedware. User adds +2 to Initiative. Only 1 piece of Speedware can be installed at a time. Requires Neural Link.

name: Sandevistan
descriptionData: Speedware. When activated as an Action adds +3 to Initiative for one minute. Has 1 hour cool down period. Only 1 piece of Speedware can be installed at a time. Requires Neural Link.

name: Chemical Analyzer
descriptionData: Chipware. Tests substance for precise chemical composition and compares to a database. Requires Chipware Socket.

name: Memory Chip
descriptionData: Data storage. User's cyberware can store or access data on it.

name: Olfactory Boost
descriptionData: Chipware. User can use Tracking Skill to track via scent. Requires Chipware Socket.

name: Pain Editor
descriptionData: Chipware. User ignores penalties due to being Seriously Wounded. Requires Chipware Socket.

name: Skill Chip
descriptionData: Chipware. User has specific Skill at Level 3 unless Skill is already 3+. Skill Chips for x2 cost Skills cost more. Requires Chipware Socket.

name: Tactile Boost
descriptionData: Chipware. User can detect motion within 20m/yd by placing hand on surface. Requires Chipware Socket.

name: Cybereye
descriptionData: Artificial eye. Each Cybereye has 3 Option Slots.

name: Anti-Dazzle
descriptionData: User immune to effects caused by flashes of light. Requires two Cybereyes and must be paired.

name: Chyron
descriptionData: Projects subscreen into user's field of vision. Requires a Cybereye.

name: Color Shift
descriptionData: Unlimited color and pattern changes for the eye. Requires a Cybereye.

name: Dartgun
descriptionData: Single shot Dartgun Exotic Weapon concealed in eye. Requires a Cybereye and takes 3 Option Slots.

name: Image Enhance
descriptionData: Adds +2 to Perception, Lip Reading, and Conceal/Reveal Object. Requires two Cybereyes and must be paired.

name: Low Light / Infrared / UV
descriptionData: User can ignore penalties due to darkness, smoke, fog, etc. Requires two Cybereyes, must be paired, and takes 2 Option Slots per Cybereye.

name: MicroOptics
descriptionData: Provides user with 400x magnification. Requires a Cybereye.

name: MicroVideo
descriptionData: Camera in eye. Records audio and video to Memory Chip or linked Agent. Requires a Cybereye and takes 2 Option Slots.

name: Radiation Detector
descriptionData: Radiation readings within 100m/yds displayed in form of blue glow. Requires a Cybereye.

name: Targeting Scope
descriptionData: Adds +1 to Check when making Aimed Shot. Requires a Cybereye.

name: TeleOptics
descriptionData: Can see detail up to 800m/yd away. +1 to Aimed Shots against target 51m/yds or farther away. Requires a Cybereye.

name: Virtuality
descriptionData: Projects cyberspace imagery over user's view of the world. Requires two Cybereyes and must be paired.

name: Cyberaudio Suite
descriptionData: Has 3 Option Slots. Cannot install more than 1.

name: Amplified Hearing
descriptionData: +2 to Perception for Checks involving hearing. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Audio Recorder
descriptionData: Records audio to Memory Chip or linked Agent. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Bug Detector
descriptionData: Beeps when within 2m/yds of a listening device. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Homing Tracer
descriptionData: Can follow a linked tracer up to 1 mile away. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Internal Agent
descriptionData: Fully functional Agent installed internally. Can be linked to a Cybereye with Chyron display. Otherwise, audio only. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Level Damper
descriptionData: User immune to effects caused by loud noises. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Radio Communicator
descriptionData: User can communicate via radio. 1 mile range. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Radio Scanner / Music Player
descriptionData: Can play music from Data Pool or Memory Chip or tune into radio broadcasts within 1 mile. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Radar Detector
descriptionData: Beeps if active radar beam is within 100m/yd. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Scrambler / Descrambler
descriptionData: Allows user to scramble outgoing communications and descramble incoming communications. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: Voice Stress Analyzer
descriptionData: +2 to Human Perception and Interrogation Checks. Requires a Cyberaudio Suite.

name: AudioVox
descriptionData: Voice synthesizer. Adds +2 to Acting and Play Instrument when singing.

name: Contraceptive Implant
descriptionData: Prevents undesired pregnancy.

name: Enhanced Antibodies
descriptionData: After stabilization, user heals BODY x 2 for each day spent resting.

name: Cybersnake
descriptionData: Esophagus mounted Very Heavy Melee Weapon. Can be concealed.

name: Gills
descriptionData: User can breathe underwater.

name: Grafted Muscle and Bone Lace
descriptionData: Increases BODY by 2. The increase changes HP, Wound Threshold, and Death Save. Multiple installments stack. Cannot raise BODY above 10.

name: Independent Air Supply
descriptionData: Provides 30 minutes of oxygen. Takes 1 hour to refill from ambient atmosphere.

name: Midnight Lady Sexual Implant
descriptionData: Sexual implant.

name: Mr. Studd Sexual Implant
descriptionData: Sexual implant.

name: Nasal Filters
descriptionData: User immune to effects of toxic gases, fumes, and similar dangers.

name: Radar / Sonar Implant
descriptionData: Scans terrain within 50m/yds. Cannot scan through cover.

name: Toxin Binders
descriptionData: Adds +2 to Resist Torture/Drugs.

name: Vampyres
descriptionData: Excellent Quality Light Melee Weapon implanted in mouth. Can be concealed. User can add Poison or Biotoxin.

name: Hidden Holster
descriptionData: Can store weapon capable of concealment inside body.

name: Skin Weave
descriptionData: User's body and head armored at SP7. Does not stack with worn Armor. Ablates. Recovers 1 SP per day of rest.

name: Subdermal Armor
descriptionData: User's body and head armored at SP11. Does not stack with worn Armor. Ablates. Recovers 1 SP per day of rest.

name: Subdermal Pocket
descriptionData: 2 inch by 4 inch storage space just under the skin with RealSkinn zipper.

name: Cyberarm
descriptionData: Replacement arm. Has 4 Option Slots. Comes installed with Standard Hand that doesn't cause Humanity Loss or take up an Option Slot.

name: Standard Hand
descriptionData: Standard cybernetic hand. Can be installed in a meat arm.

name: Big Knucks
descriptionData: Armored knuckles. Medium Melee Weapon. Can be concealed. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm.

name: Cyberdeck
descriptionData: Cyberdeck installed in Cyberarm. Requires a Cyberarm and takes up 3 Option Slots.

name: Grapple Hand
descriptionData: Fires hand, along with a grapple line up to 30m/yds. Cannot be used as a weapon. Requires a Cyberarm.

name: Medscanner
descriptionData: Medscanner installed in Cyberarm. Helps diagnose illness and injury. +2 to First Aid and Paramedic. Requires a Cyberarm and takes 2 Option Slots.

name: Popup Grenade Launcher
descriptionData: A single shot Grenade Launcher installed in a Cyberarm. Weapon can be concealed. Requires a Cyberarm and takes up 2 Option Slots.

name: Popup Melee Weapon
descriptionData: Any Light, Medium, or Heavy Melee Weapon installed in a Cyberarm. Weapon can be concealed even if not normally concealable. Requires a Cyberarm and takes up 2 Option Slots.

name: Popup Shield
descriptionData: A Bulletproof Shield installed in the Cyberarm. Can be concealed and replaced when at 0 HP. Requires a Cyberarm and takes up 3 Option Slots.

name: Popup Ranged Weapon
descriptionData: Any one-handed ranged weapon installed in a Cyberarm. Weapon can be concealed even if not normally concealable. Requires a Cyberarm and takes up 2 Option Slots.

name: Quick Change Mount
descriptionData: Allows user to remove or install a Cyberarm as an Action.

name: Rippers
descriptionData: Carbo-glass claws. Medium Melee Weapon. Can be concealed. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm.

name: Scratchers
descriptionData: Carbo-glass fingernails. Light Melee Weapon. Can be concealed. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm.

name: Shoulder Cam
descriptionData: Video camera mounted in shoulder. Can be concealed. Requires a Cyberarm and takes up 2 Option Slots.

name: Slice N Dice
descriptionData: Monofilament whip implanted in the thumb. Medium Melee Weapon. Can be concealed. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm.

name: Subdermal Grip
descriptionData: Allows user to use Smartgun without Interface Plug. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm. Requires Neural Link.

name: Techscanner
descriptionData: Techscanner installed in Cyberarm. Helps diagnose broken tech. +2 to multiple TECH-based Skills. Requires a Cyberarm and takes 2 Option Slots.

name: Tool Hand
descriptionData: Fingers contain screwdriver, wrench, small drill, and other tools. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm.

name: Wolvers
descriptionData: Long claws extended from the knuckles. Heavy Melee Weapon. Can be concealed. Can be installed as only piece of Cyberware in a meat arm.

name: Cyberleg
descriptionData: Replacement leg. Has 3 Option Slots. Comes installed with Standard Foot that doesn't cause Humanity Loss or take up an Option Slot.

name: Standard Foot
descriptionData: Standard cybernetic foot. Can be installed in a meat leg.

name: Grip Foot
descriptionData: Traction enhanced. Negates movement penalty when climbing. Requires two Cyberlegs and must be paired.

name: Jump Booster
descriptionData: Hydraulics in legs. Negates movement penalty when jumping. Requires two Cyberlegs, takes up 2 Option Slots, and must be paired.

name: Skate Foot
descriptionData: Inline skates built into feet. Can be concealed. Increases movement by 6m/yds when using Run Action. Requires two Cyberlegs and must be paired.

name: Talon Foot
descriptionData: Blade mounted in foot. Light Melee Weapon. Can be concealed. Can be installed as the only piece of Cyberware in a meat leg.

name: Web Foot
descriptionData: Thin webbing between toes. Negates movement penalty when swimming. Requires two Cyberlegs and must be paired.

name: Hardened Shielding
descriptionData: Cyberlimb and installed options cannot be rendered inoperable by EMP pulses or Non-Black ICE Program effects. Requires Cyberarm or Cyberleg.

name: Plastic Covering
descriptionData: Plastic coating for Cyberlimb. Available in wide variety of colors and patterns. Requires a Cyberarm or Cyberleg but does not take an Option Slot.

name: Realskinn Covering
descriptionData: Artificial skin coating for Cyberlimb. Requires a Cyberarm or Cyberleg but does not take an Option Slot.

name: Superchrome Covering
descriptionData: Shiny metallic coating for Cyberlimb. +2 to Wardrobe and Style. Requires a Cyberarm or Cyberleg but does not take an Option Slot.

name: Artificial Shoulder Mount
descriptionData: User can mount 2 Cyberarms under first set of arms.

name: Implanted Linear Frame Beta
descriptionData: Enhanced skeleton and support structure. Increases BODY to 14. The increase changes HP, Wound Threshold, and Death Save. Requires BODY 8 and 2 Grafted Muscles and Bone Lace.

name: Implanted Linear Frame Sigma
descriptionData: Enhanced skeleton and support structure. Increases BODY to 12. The increase changes HP, Wound Threshold, and Death Save. Requires BODY 6 and Grafted Muscles and Bone Lace.

name: MultiOptic Mount
descriptionData: User can mount up to 5 additional Cybereyes.

name: Sensor Array
descriptionData: User can install up to 5 additional Cyberaudio Options. Requires Cyberaudio Suite but does not take up Cyberaudio Option Slot.
